After a few days, The bees are gone. Gogo and Banzi go to check on the garden. The flowers have also disappeared!
“Yho! Yho! Yho!” “Oh no!” says Gogo. Banzi says. “Don’t worry, I have a magic trick to call “Gogo, the bees are gone!” them right back!”
“Mmm… magic!” “Then, we Banzi says. need to leave a bucket of water “First, we need to plant in the garden.” new flowers,” says Gogo.
Gogo and Banzi plant sunflower seeds and leave the bucket of water in the garden.

“Busy, busy bees. Busy, busy Gogo stands in the bees. Come back to me!” middle of the garden, raises up her right hand Banzi whispers after Gogo. and says: Before they leave, “Busy, busy bees. Busy, busy bees. Come back to Banzi!”
Banzi and Gogo check the garden every day for a week.
The bees are back! Banzi and Gogo laugh as the bees dance from flower to flower.
